description: A payroll specialist needs to process the bi-weekly payroll for 500 employees.

nodes.task_description: Import and validate timesheet data from the time and attendance system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully imports all hours and flags any missing or unapproved timesheets.

nodes.task_description: Calculate gross pay, taxes, benefits deductions, and net pay for each employee.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly calculates all payroll components.

nodes.task_description: Generate payslips for all employees and a bank file for direct deposit payments.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates all required output files.

nodes.task_description: Create the summary payroll journal entry for posting to the general ledger.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a balanced journal entry with the correct GL accounts.
